mnemonic: general [дже'нерал] общий - («Дженерал - моторе») - общее достояние Америки.

examples.eng: The film is on general release.
The practice threatens to become general.
A general ranks a captain.
There was a general disposition to remain.
examples.ru: Большинство склонялось к тому, чтобы остаться.

examples.eng: General Meeting
This is true in a general sense.
General Executive Committee
Her efforts will redound to the general good.
examples.ru: Её усилия будут способствовать общему благу.

examples.eng: General Assembly
The general public is in favor of the law.
examples.ru: Широкая общественность — на стороне этого закона.

examples.eng: The opposition are calling for a general election.
At that moment the general hilarity was at its pitch.
examples.ru: В тот момент всеобщее веселье достигло апогея.

examples.eng: Watford General Hospital
Secretary General of the UNO
The General's eyes swept the horizon.
I'm just the general dogsbody around here.
examples.ru: Тут я просто мальчик на побегушках.

examples.eng: A general colouring was taken from Christianity.
examples.ru: Основная тональность была взята из христианства.

examples.eng: A general state of need exists among the homeless.
He has been breveted a brigadier general.
examples.ru: Ему досрочно присвоено звание бригадного генерала.

examples.eng: He was on the general staff.
A general outranks a colonel.
United Nations General Assembly
General Services Administration
It's a good general fertilizer.
The general sent a coded message.
The general commanded a huge army.
A general pattern began to emerge.
a general upward movement of fish
I hate paperwork as a general rule.
examples.ru: Как правило, я терпеть не могу бумажную работу.

examples.eng: We are generaled by an incompetent!
